severability; to provide for certain notices with regard to amendments to certain provisions of the Constitution; to provide that the number of members of each house of the Georgia General Assembly shall be fixed by general law under certain conditions; to provide for related matters; to provide for submission of this amendment for ratification or rejection; and for other purposes."}],
